title: Package Management
html:
Package Management

Contents

  • Debian / Ubuntu / Kali (apt)
  • dpkg (lower level)
  • Snap / flatpak
  • Python (pip / pipx / venv)

Debian / Ubuntu / Kali (apt)

CommandDescription
 
apt update
refresh package lists
apt full-upgrade
upgrade all (allow removals)
apt install nmap
install a package
apt install -y --no-install-recommends pkg
minimal install
apt remove pkg
remove (keep config)
apt purge pkg
remove + config
apt autoremove --purge
drop unused deps
apt search keyword
search names + descriptions
apt show pkg
package details
apt list --installed | grep foo
is it installed?
apt-mark hold pkg
pin / prevent upgrade
apt-cache policy pkg
available versions per repo

dpkg (lower level)

CommandDescription
 
dpkg -i pkg.deb
install local .deb
dpkg -l | grep foo
list installed matching
dpkg -L pkg
list files installed by pkg
dpkg -S /usr/bin/ssh
which package owns this file
dpkg --configure -a
finish interrupted installs
apt --fix-broken install
fix broken deps

Snap / flatpak

CommandDescription
 
snap list
installed snaps
snap install nmap
flatpak list
flatpak install flathub org.mozilla.firefox

Python (pip / pipx / venv)

CommandDescription
 
python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate
create + activate venv
pip install -r requirements.txt
pip install --user pkg
user install (outside venv)
pipx install impacket
isolated app install
pip list --outdated
